message.content: {"category": "惠企服务", "topic": "本月官方惠企活动通知", "content": "尊敬的辖区商户您好，本月官方惠企扶持活动已正式上线，具体申报流程、补贴标准可登录mock-gov.local政务服务专区查询，如有疑问请联系属地企业服务专员咨询。"}

function.name: send_sms
function.arguments: {"file_path": "/mock-gov.local/workspace/merchant/subscribed_merchants.csv", "sms_content": "Get 20% off on your next purchase! Use code SAVE20. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.", "recipient_filter": "subscription_status=subscribed", "reference_tool_id": []}
